description: Shared identifiers for (cross-references in) NEN schemas. Identitfiers are not versioned, and only updated with non-breaking changes (i.e. additions)
title: NenDefinitions
$comment: Last modified on 2026-03-06 by Hans Bot - NEN.

memberId.description: Unique identifier for the committee member, consisting of numeric characters.

nenCommitteeId.description: Unique identifier for the committee, typically in the format 'organization:committee:uniqueId'.

nenCompatibilityId.$comment: Internally known as nenAlfrescoId. Needed for backwards compatibility. Internal reference: https://nendelft.atlassian.net/wiki/spaces/Normenbank/pages/146538535/nenAlfrescoId

nenContentRefId.description: Unique 7 digit number identifying the NEN release item.

nenFamilyAdmin.description: Name of the family, concatenation of an SDO and a number, seperated by a single space

nenFamilyId.description: Unique identification of a family of norms conform NEN definition

nenProjectId.description: Unique identifier for the NEN project.

nenPublicationId.description: Unique identifier for the NEN publication. Verify if this holds true for other SGOs' publications

releaseItemId.description: Unique identifier for the NEN release item. Num(8)
